_comment: CSS hygiene thresholds enforced by scripts/analyze-css.js against the BUILT _site/css/style.css. Set ~5% above current values when introduced, so the gate is meaningful but not immediately blocking. Trim PRs (see CLAUDE.md > CSS hygiene) MUST ratchet these values DOWN as they trim, parallel to bundleSizeLimit.css in package.json. NOTE 2026-04: thresholds re-baselined alongside the Shoelace --sl-color-* token bridge (selfhosted-h0ws). The bridge declares ~36 custom properties (the neutral + primary ramps under :root, with html.dark overriding the neutral ramp) so every Shoelace component themes from a single source of truth instead of per-component CSS — net CSS is actually smaller than pre-bridge main, but the per-bucket shape shifted. Buffer is 5% above branch-current.
